purpose: Central system of record for account relationships, opportunity tracking, activity logging, and health scoring.
csm_usage: Primary account management tool. CSMs log activities, track account health, manage renewal pipeline, and document client interactions.

fields.name: ContractTier__c
fields.description: Custom field — contract tier. NOT auto-synced from DocuSign.

fields.name: HealthScore__c
fields.description: Custom field — CSM-entered health score. Updated manually.

fields.name: RenewalDate__c
fields.description: Custom field — next renewal date. Manually maintained.

fields.name: LastActivityDate
fields.description: Auto-populated by Salesforce based on logged activities.

fields.name: OpenTicketCount__c
fields.description: Custom field — NOT synced from Zendesk. CSM updates manually or it goes stale.

Activity (Task/Event).integration_note: Outlook emails are NOT auto-logged here. Calls are NOT auto-logged. Every activity must be manually created by the CSM.

known_gaps.description: No bidirectional sync with Zendesk. OpenTicketCount__c is a manually-maintained field that is frequently stale.
known_gaps.impact: CSMs cannot see ticket state from CRM; must switch to Zendesk manually.

known_gaps.description: No integration with DocuSign. ContractTier__c and RenewalDate__c are manually entered and may not reflect the most current executed agreement.
known_gaps.impact: Risk of CSM operating on incorrect SLA assumptions.

known_gaps.description: No email or calendar sync. Outlook activity is not captured. CSMs must manually log every client communication as a Salesforce Activity.
known_gaps.impact: 17% of interactions missing from CRM; account history gaps affect renewals and handoffs.
